shortDescription: Planning poker, dot voting, and agile estimation for SharePoint and Teams. Session data stays in your site lists—no external backend.
searchResultsSummary: Planning poker for SharePoint and Teams — private votes, facilitator reveal, tenant-resident data.
longDescriptionPlain: Sprint Align is a SharePoint-native planning poker and agile estimation app for Scrum teams. Run planning poker, confidence votes, dot voting, and surveys inside SharePoint Online and Microsoft Teams. Join by code, vote privately, reveal together, and save agreed estimates. All session data stays in SharePoint lists on your site — no external backend.
searchKeywordsExtended: planning poker, agile estimation, story points, sprint planning, scrum, dot voting, fist of five, confidence vote, SharePoint, Microsoft Teams, retrospective, backlog grooming, facilitator, estimation session, planning poker SharePoint
licensingModel: One license per SharePoint site collection; 14-day free trial; unlimited users in licensed site

screenshots.caption: Home — Join sessions with a six-character code or start a new estimation workshop from a branded full-page home screen.
Live voting — Everyone votes privately; the facilitator tracks live participation and reveals the round together.
Results — See average, median, range, and outliers at a glance, then save the agreed final estimate.
Settings — Site owners provision lists, set retention, branding, layout, and session-creation rules.
How it works — End-to-end scrum flow: facilitator sets up, team joins, votes privately, reveals together, and agrees on estimates.

releaseNotes: Sprint Align v1.1.3.30 — planning poker and six vote types, join-by-code sessions, private voting with facilitator reveal, custom decks, session history, CSV export, unified Settings hub, full-page layout, and SharePoint-native data storage.

apiPermissions.purpose: Optional backlog import and story-point writeback (feature flag)
